query:
SELECT id, code, trade_name FROM cpa_consultants_master WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY code;
SELECT id, code, label FROM cpa_building_categories WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT id, code, trade_name FROM cpa_consultants_master WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY code;
SELECT id, code, label FROM cpa_building_categories WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order;
